so when a Hurricane spins it's tightly wound so all the energy is towards the center. That's why the say closest to the eye is the worst. This storm will hit some shear from a cold front also coming down and will be undercutted in the south part so they say. This will create the storm to weaken a bit but also expand because it's spin will get interrupted I guess is the best way to put it.

I have been here since 1988. The worst of the storms 10-15 miles from the eye. Make sure you pay attention where that goes so you can judge what is best. Many times you will get the outer bands of the hurricane which isn’t pleasant but you can make it through. Anything over 100mph might come in short bursts but sustained winds are what you are looking for to know
